name: alpha_001_qrev_mix
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252)), ts_zscore(analyst_revision_rank_derivative, 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 7), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_002_stable_cf
expr: add(group_rank(rank(subtract(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252)), ts_zscore(ts_std_dev(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 126), 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 7), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_003_quality_bal
expr: add(group_rank(rank(subtract(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, assets), 252), ts_zscore(divide(ebitda, enterprise_value), 252)), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252)), ts_zscore(divide(debt, assets), 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 6), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_005_value_quality
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(bookvalue_ps, close), 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 7), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_006_profit_rev
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252)), ts_zscore(earnings_certainty_rank_derivative, 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 6), close)), subindustry))
